text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're in the middle of a meeting, but Mejiro
McQueen seems to be zoning out. Feeling
concerned, I bring it up...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...What? Oh. My apologies. I was in a bit of a
stupor. Perhaps I'm tired from my last race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I need to focus. A Mejiro must carry herself with
dignity at all times.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Please excuse my rudeness. I'm fine now. Um...
With that, well...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My guess is she's still feeling tired. I should
probably reevaluate her race schedule to ensure
she can perform at her best going forward.
